author: frido22
name: Mac mini M4 16GB Staged Reverse-Tail Recurrence Curriculum
blurb: Apple Silicon / MLX non-record submission: compact 9x512 SP1024 recurrent-tail model with reverse tail traversal, decoder-output anchoring, staged recurrence curriculum, learned output calibration, rank-64 bigram adapter, and quant-aware int8+zlib endgame.
